name: SailPoint IdentityNow
description: Identity governance and administration platform. Monitor user access, roles, and compliance.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to SailPoint IdentityNow
2. Go to Preferences → Personal Access Tokens
3. Create a new token with appropriate scope (sp:scopes:all for full access)
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Enter your tenant name from your URL
6. Paste all values below

credentialFields.label: Tenant Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your SailPoint tenant name from your URL: https://{tenant}.identitynow.com

credentialFields.label: PAT Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: From a Personal Access Token in SailPoint → Preferences → Personal Access Tokens.

credentialFields.label: PAT Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Shown once when creating the Personal Access Token.

checks.name: SailPoint App Availability
checks.description: Verifies SailPoint IdentityNow API is accessible.
